backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the CoTimetable app; handles user registration, messaging with optional file attachments, timetable entry CRUD, and an admin system reset function, using access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the 'Enter the Sky' button fix on LandingPage.tsx to test ID REQ-34, listing the affected file and relevant component dependencies.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component, hook, page, and utility in one or two sentences for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'CoTimetable' that mounts the React app at the #root div and loads the main.tsx module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in QueryClientProvider and ThemeProvider, conditionally renders LandingPage, Dashboard, or a loading spinner based on authentication and profile state, and mounts persistent MusicToggleButton and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AddEditTaskModal: Dialog modal for creating or editing timetable entries with title, start/end datetime inputs, and a recurrence selector (one-time, weekday, weekend), wired to backend add/update mutations.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Passcode-protected admin dialog that allows resetting all system state (users, messages, timetable) by calling the backend resetSystem mutation after verifying a hardcoded passcode.
frontend/src/components/AnimatedSkyBackg: Renders a fixed, full-screen animated sky background with gradient layers, a starfield image, drifting cloud layers, light ray glows, and randomly generated floating particles.
frontend/src/components/ChatInterface.ts: Provides a real-time chat UI between two users, supporting text messages and file/image attachments with upload progress, rendered as styled message bubbles with timestamps.
frontend/src/components/EditableDisplayN: Inline editable display name component that toggles between a read-only label and an input field, with validation and async save via the updateDisplayName mutation.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Top-level layout wrapper that renders a sticky header with the app logo, an Internet Identity login/logout button, and an admin panel trigger, wrapping page content as children.
frontend/src/components/MusicToggleButto: Fixed floating button in the bottom-right corner that toggles ambient background music mute state using the useAmbientMusic hook.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for new user onboarding that collects a display name and timezone, then calls the register mutation; blocks dismissal until registration succeeds.
frontend/src/components/TimetableView.ts: Renders a 24-hour timetable calendar view with task blocks, supporting add/edit/delete of timetable entries, date navigation, and recurrence logic (none/weekday/weekend) with timezone-aware display.
frontend/src/components/UserClockDisplay: Displays live clock cards for the current user and their partner, showing real-time local time, date, and timezone, with skeleton and waiting states while data loads.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAmbientMusic.ts: Manages a singleton ambient music Audio instance with module-level mute state, persisting preference to sessionStorage and notifying all hook subscribers on toggle.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout, identity persistence across reloads, and status tracking via a React context and AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profile CRUD, registration, and timetable entry operations, wrapping the ICP actor with typed mutations and queries.
Custom React hook that calculates countdown timers and active status for Sky: Children of the Light recurring in-game events (Geyser, Grandma, Turtle) anchored to Pacific Time 2-hour cycles.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Cinzel/Raleway fonts, configuring Tailwind with a Sky-themed dark OKLCH color palette, and defining utility classes for glass cards, glows, and a celestial sky gradient.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main authenticated dashboard page showing live user clocks, a Sky Events navigation button, a timetable panel, and a chat interface, with partner profile lookup via React Query.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page with an animated sky background, app description, and an Internet Identity login button that handles re-authentication edge cases.
frontend/src/pages/SkyEventsScreen.tsx: Full-screen view displaying a table of Sky: Children of the Light recurring events (Geyser, Grandma, Turtle) with live countdown timers, active status indicators, and local/Pacific time display.
frontend/src/utils/timezones.ts: Exports a comprehensive static array of IANA timezone identifier strings for use in timezone selection UI.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom fonts (Raleway, Cinzel), and a Sky: Children of the Light themed color palette using oklch values for midnight, amber, gold, and indigo scales.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 27) describing a two-user synchronized timetable/chat app on Internet Computer with known bugs (broken registration, timetable CRUD, admin reset, music toggle, and landing page navigation) and architectural notes.
